pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 21 features (e.g., virtual threads, pattern matching) will fail to compile with source/target 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Starter Parent as the project parent to manage dependencies and defaults for Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE namespaces; without the parent or explicit management, dependency resolution for Spring Boot starters may fail or conflict with older javax dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet and javax.persistence dependencies with their Jakarta EE equivalents (jakarta.servlet-api, jakarta.persistence-api).
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+, which moved packages from javax.* to jakarta.*. Code importing javax.servlet or javax.persistence will fail to compile or throw NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JAXB dependencies to use Jakarta-compatible versions or explicit implementations required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and the javax.xml.bind namespace is not available in Jakarta EE 9+ without explicit dependencies. Spring Boot 3 expects Jakarta namespaces or specific implementations.
